content:
I am pleased to share the details of our published edited books. If you are working in related research areas, you may find these books useful as references for your academic and research work.

Note: The indexing status of these books was determined after publication. Many books published by the same publisher under these book series are already indexed in Scopus and Web of Science (WoS). There were no publication charges—only high-quality scholarly contributions were considered for publication.

For any queries or collaboration opportunities, please feel free to connect with Prof. (Dr.) Vishal Jain or reach out via email at drvishaljain@yahoo.com.

A heartfelt thank you to all my co-editors and contributing authors for their dedication, timely efforts, and valuable contributions in making the publication of these books possible.

comment: Post-publication indexing claims often create confusion in CV screening; evaluators usually verify current Scopus/WoS status, not series history.
